titleStmt.title: SII 16.139: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 139. (A.R. No. 498 of 1906.) MŌPŪRU, PULIVENDLA TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the central shrine of the Bhairavēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhin, Māgha śu. 7, Rathasaptamī, Monday, corresponding to 1545 A.D., January 19, °50.

It records the remission of all taxes like durgavartana, daṇāyanivartana, bēḍige, kāṇika and others in favour of the Vidvan mahajanas of the villages belonging to temples and to agrahāras in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-Sakali-sīma obtained by the donor, Timmayadēva-Mahārāju, son of Narasiṅgayadēva-Mahārāju and grandson of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Avubhaḷadēva-Mahārāju of Ātrēya-gōtra and Sōmavaṁśa as nāyaṅkara from the king. A similar remission of these taxes in the villages granted to the Bhairavēsvara temple of Mōpūra is also recorded with the stipulation that the amount accrued was to be utilised for the daily worship and the rathōtsvava of the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhāna śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1466 Agunē
ṁṭi krōdhisaṁvatsara māgha śu 7 sō śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadā
sivadēvamahārāyaru vijayānagarapaṭnamaṁdunu ratna
siṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛthivisāṁmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu
śrīma(ṁN)nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Ātrēyagōtraṁ sōmavaṁśō(ṁ)
dbhavulaina naṁdyāla Avubhaḷadēvamahārāja pautṛlaina narasiṁgaya
dēvamahārāja putṛlaina tiṁmayadēvamahārājulugāru ghaṁḍi
kōṭasīmalōni dēvasthānālu Āgrahārāla Aṁdali nānāgō
tra nānāsūtra nānāśākhādhyāya pavitṛlaina Aśēṣadē
va vidva(Nṁ)nmahājanālaku yicina sarvamānyadharmaśāsana
kramameṭlaṁnanu sadāsivamahārāyaru māku nā
yaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina ghaṁḍikōṭa sakalisīmalōni dē
vatāgrāmālnu Agrahārālanuṁnu pūrvāna ghaṁḍi
kōṭaku Acēṭi durgavartana dhaṇāyanivartana bēḍige
kāṇika kaṭnalu mōdalainavi yeṁnigalavu Aṁniṁni
yī tathātithi rathasaptamīpuṁṇyakālamaṁdu pināki
nīnadītīramaṁdu lōkapāvana śrīnṛsiṁhvadēvuni saṁni
dhini śrīmadahōbalanṛsiṁhvaprītigānu sarvamānyaṁgā
nu sēstimigāna mī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu Ācaṁ
drārkkasthāIgānu kratvādi Anuṣṭhānālu sēsukoni sukhā
na vuṁḍēdi yī maryādanē mōpūri bhairavēśvaruni nitya
dhūpadīpanaivēdyaAṁgaraṁgavaibhavālu rathamahōtsavaṁ
mōdalaina mahōtsavālaku bhayiravēśvaruniki cellēgrā
mālanu Acē durgadaṇāyanivartana beṁḍige kāṇiki kaṭṇa
lu mōdalainavi yeṁnigalavu Aṁniṁni yī tathātithi pu
ṇyakālamaṁdu sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakaṁgānu
sarvamānyaṁgānu dhāravōsi yicina dharmaśāsanaṁ I
dharmānaku yevvaru vighnamainānu gōbrāṁhmani vadhiṁci
na dōṣānapōvuvāru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pa
radattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 16.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
